ground_truth.title: A Complete List of 'Check, Please! Bay Area' Restaurants A-Z | KQED
ground_truth.main_content: Looking for a new way to see every restaurant featured on Check, Please! Bay Area? Visit our KQED Bay Area Restaurant Guide (now online in beta!), a robust tool highlighting more than 800 video-based restaurant reviews from the everyday people who appeared as guests on the show dating back 20 years. Rather see a text-based list? Check out the comprehensive list of every restaurant ever featured on Check, Please! Bay Area below. Browse by region, re-watch your favorite segments, and enjoy food reviewed by regular Bay Area residents! The page contains an alphabetical listing of all restaurants ever featured on the show, organized by region: San Francisco, East Bay, Peninsula/South Bay, North Bay, and Monterey Bay. Each restaurant entry includes a link to its review page and regional designation. Many entries also indicate if restaurants have closed.
